overview: Optimal Man provides testosterone replacement therapy with in-office testing and injections. The clinic serves men both through in-person visits and tele-health appointments.
highlights: In-office testing of Total Testosterone and PSA levels
Tele-health option with prescriptions shipped to patient
First injection available during initial appointment
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement therapy, with tele-health available for those outside the immediate area; discount for veterans and first responders.
